summary: Blackout Override | User Lookup | No Conviva Sessions Available
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile on the dashboard
And the user inputs an email in the "Email" field
And presses enter
Then the user should land on the "User Info Lookup" page
And the user should see the "Blackout Override", "User Lookup" and "Overrides" tab right next to the "User Lookup" tab on top of the page
And the user should see a search bar labeled "Email"
And the instruction text should read:
"Search for a user by email to view their information, existing overrides and recent Conviva sessions"
And the entered email should remain visible in the field
And the user should see the following three sections:
||*User info*|"ID", "Email", First Name" "Last Name"|
||*Existing Overrides*|"There are no existing overrides for this user."|
||*Conviva Sessions*|"No recent Conviva sessions were found."|

steps.action:
